title: Cross-border driver & operator training for DADTCO Mozambique
summary: A full defensive-driving and operator training programme delivered on the ground in Mozambique — classroom, practical and certification — for DADTCO's cassava-processing fleet.
overview: DADTCO (Dutch Agricultural Development & Trading Company) runs mobile cassava processing across Mozambique, with a fleet of heavy trucks, light vehicles and field bikes. SierraZim deployed its instructors to deliver a complete training programme on site — proof that training done by experts travels across borders.
delivered: Oral and theory classroom training on road safety and vehicle knowledge
Practical defensive driving on a purpose-laid field course
Technical skills assessment to international standards
Certification for drivers who passed theory and practical
outcomes: A certified, competent driving team across the DADTCO fleet
Defensive-driving discipline embedded for safer daily operations
Graduates certified on completion and ready for work
